Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 248 

SRVC_PRVDR_NPI 

LABEL: Servicing Provider NPI 

DESCRIPTION: The National Provider Identifier (NPI) of the health care professional who delivers or completes a 
particular medical service or non-surgical procedure. 

SHORT NAME: SRVC_PRVDR_NPI 

LONG NAME: SRVC_PRVDR_NPI 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 10 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP line 
LT line 
OT line
